creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
Since hastymail development is pretty slow (new version roll out rarely), I decided to make port that would be more or less up to date with hastymail SVN repository.

I suppose you should recopy www/hastymail2 to www/hastymail2-devel

Attached patch. If you need shar, let me know

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
